function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"goal": "Add two independent endpoints, feature A and feature B, each in its own package, both registered through the shared core driver.", "context": "A Python service. Feature A lives under src/a/ and feature B under src/b/. Both register into a shared core entry point. The two features are independently testable but converge on one driver class.", "scope": {"include": [], "create": ["src/a/feature_a.py", "src/b/feature_b.py"], "exclude": ["node_modules", ".git", ".semspec"], "do_not_touch": ["README.md", "api/requirements.txt"]}}
